description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout with large glass windows and sliding doors that open to a patio and garden area. The exterior is finished in a combination of white plaster and light wood paneling, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and landscaped greenery, including palm trees and shrubs. The interior is visible through expansive windows, revealing open-plan living and dining spaces with minimalist furnishings and built-in shelving. A partially enclosed terrace or sunroom is attached to one side, providing additional outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, white and wood finishes, and landscaped gardens. The design features open-plan interiors and a sunroom, blending indoor and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, landscaped garden, and large windows revealing the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper terrace, glass sunroom, and the extension of the patio area with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional windows, and the sunroom structure extending from the main building.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and lush landscaping with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
